scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix packages/core && npm install --prefix packages/host-local && npm install --prefix apps/cli && npm install --prefix apps/desktop && npm run build --prefix packages/core
scripts.test:host-local: npm run build:core && vitest run packages/host-local/src
scripts.test:cli: npm run build:core && vitest run apps/cli/src
scripts.test:desktop: npm run build:core && vitest run apps/desktop/src
scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:host-local && npm run test:cli && npm run test:desktop
scripts.verify:pre-push: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run desktop:build
